mapper.select: SELECT p.project_id, p.project_key, p.project_name, p.project_type_code, p.project_status, p.owner_user_id, p.start_date, p.end_date, p.description, p.created_at, p.updated_at, COUNT(DISTINCT pm.project_member_id) AS member_count, COUNT(DISTINCT t.task_id) AS task_count, COUNT(DISTINCT m.milestone_id) AS milestone_count FROM schedule_project p LEFT JOIN schedule_project_member pm ON pm.project_id = p.project_id LEFT JOIN schedule_task t ON t.project_id = p.project_id LEFT JOIN schedule_milestone m ON m.project_id = p.project_id WHERE p.project_id = #{project_id} GROUP BY p.project_id, p.project_key, p.project_name, p.project_type_code, p.project_status, p.owner_user_id, p.start_date, p.end_date, p.description, p.created_at, p.updated_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO schedule_project ( project_key, project_name, project_type_code, project_status, owner_user_id, start_date, end_date, description ) VALUES ( #{project_key}, #{project_name}, #{project_type_code}, #{project_status}, #{owner_user_id}, CAST(#{start_date} AS DATE), CAST(#{end_date} AS DATE), #{description} )
mapper.update: UPDATE schedule_project SET project_key = #{project_key}, project_name = #{project_name}, project_type_code = #{project_type_code}, project_status = #{project_status}, owner_user_id = #{owner_user_id}, start_date = CAST(#{start_date} AS DATE), end_date = CAST(#{end_date} AS DATE), description = #{description}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE project_id = #{project_id}
